title: SlashBlade Mobs
description: A mod that adds several mobs that fight using SlashBlade.
body:
# SlashBlade Mobs

An addon for SlashBlade: Resharped that adds various mobs capable of fighting with SlashBlades.

# Description

This mod introduces variants of certain humanoid mobs from vanilla Minecraft that are able to fight using SlashBlades.

Unlike their vanilla counterparts, these new mobs can wield SlashBlades in different ways, offering a combat experience distinct from the original game.

> *Each one possesses extraordinary skill;*
> 
> *Each has its own unique techniques;*
> 
> *Their swordsmanship and mastery are nothing short of breathtaking;*
> 
> *And their secret combos are sure to deliver players an unexpected surprise—*
> 
> *—As written on a certain scrap of paper left behind by a predecessor*

# License

This mod is open-source under the MIT License.

You may include it in your modpacks/servers as long as you **comply with the license terms**.
